sohzm/cheating-daddy ·GitHub ⭐ 5118 JavaScript · AI Assistant, Gemini 2.0, Interview Prep, Electron, Real-time AI, Screen Capture, Open Source

What it is

Cheating Daddy is an AI-powered personal assistant designed to provide real-time support during video calls and interviews. It captures the user's screen and system audio, feeding it to Google's Gemini 2.0 Flash Live model to generate instant, context-aware suggestions and answers via a transparent, always-on-top overlay.

Problems solved

  • Nervousness or knowledge gaps during high-stakes technical interviews or sales calls
  • Need for immediate contextual information without switching windows or losing eye contact
  • Difficulty in transcribing and summarizing live meeting segments on the fly

How to get started

Enter a Gemini API key and select a profile (e.g., Interview, Business Meeting). Click 'Start Session' to launch the transparent overlay. Position the window with keyboard shortcuts; the AI will listen to the interviewer and provide real-time helpful hints on your screen.

sohzm/cheating-daddy is positioned as a cheating daddy is an ai-powered personal assistant designed to provide real-time support during video calls and interviews. it captures the user's screen and system audio, feeding it to google's gemini 2.0 flash live model to generate instant, context-aware suggestions and answers via a transparent, always-on-top overlay. It aims to provide developers with a robust, JavaScript-based solution for a free and opensource app that lets you gain an unfair advantage.

Traditional methods in this domain often suffer from Nervousness or knowledge gaps during high-stakes technical interviews or sales calls. sohzm/cheating-daddy addresses this by cheating daddy is an ai-powered personal assistant designed to provide real-time support during video calls and interviews. it captures the user's screen and system audio, feeding it to google's gemini 2.0 flash live model to generate instant, context-aware suggestions and answers via a transparent, always-on-top overlay, offering a significant performance boost and better developer ergonomics compared to existing alternatives.

3. Technical Architecture

The project is built using JavaScript, adopting a modular and scalable design. It leverages modern industry standards to ensure compatibility across different environments, focusing on efficiency and ease of integration.

5. Code Organization

The repository is structured logically, with core functionality separated from utilities and examples. This organization facilitates easy navigation and contribution for developers looking to extend the tool's capabilities.

6. Quick Start Suggestion

To get started, enter a gemini api key and select a profile (e.g., interview, business meeting). click 'start session' to launch the transparent overlay. position the window with keyboard shortcuts; the ai will listen to the interviewer and provide real-time helpful hints on your screen. This will allow you to quickly evaluate the tool and integrate it into your existing development workflow.

7. Summary

An essential, JavaScript-powered utility that streamlines a free and opensource app that lets you gain an unfair advantage; it effectively tackles Nervousness or knowledge gaps during high-stakes technical interviews or sales calls while maintaining a high standard of code quality and usability.
